step_rationale: Cardiomyocyte injury marker; targets BCL2L13 in cell death pathways.
mechanism: miR-96-5p is elevated in acute myocardial infarction and regulates cardiomyocyte apoptosis through suppression of anti-apoptotic BCL2L13.

references.title: Serum miR-96-5p is a novel and non-invasive marker of acute myocardial infarction associated with coronary artery disease.
